TheCherishedPrinceofDongwuyang[東武陽懷王] was[Cao] Jian. He was installed in the seventh year of theera [226]. That year, he died. In the third year of theera [235], he was awarded his posthumous title. He had no sons, and the fiefdom was abolished.
